42],[342,515,1776530233754],[345,524,1776530233767],[346,529,1776530233783],[346,530,1776530233801],[345,530,1776530233809],[344,530,1776530233832],[343,530,1776530233859],[342,530,1776530233879],[341,530,1776530233896],[342,531,1776530233937],[343,531,1776530233946],[343,532,1776530233955],[344,533,1776530233972],[345,533,1776530233979],[346,534,1776530233990],[347,534,1776530233998],[348,535,1776530234014],[349,536,1776530234027],[350,536,1776530234034],[351,537,1776530234045],[352,537,1776530234060],[353,538,1776530234070],[355,538,1776530234078],[356,539,1776530234086],[357,540,1776530234095],[358,540,1776530234103],[357,540,1776530234127],[357,541,1776530234136],[356,541,1776530234150],[355,541,1776530234171],[354,542,1776530234182],[353,542,1776530234199]],"mm-mp":17.727941176470587,"md":[[340,529,1776530233925]],"md-mp":3785.25,"mu":[[340,529,1776530234112]],"mu-mp":3814.75},"v":1,"tc":{}}
